title: backup_plan
description: One backup plan or policy — one record per AWS Backup plan, GCP Backup plan, or Azure Backup policy. Policies check that active plans exist with retention rules.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

is_active.description: Backup plan is active and running scheduled backups.

has_retention_rule.description: Plan has at least one retention rule configured.

retention_days.description: Retention period in days; omitted when no retention rule is defined (see has_retention_rule).

covers_resource_types.description: Resource types covered by this plan (e.g. ['EC2', 'RDS']).
